# YM2151-LLE

Very low-level Yamaha YM2151(OPM) and YM2164(OPP) emulator using die shot.

Special thanks to John McMaster for decapping YM2151 and gtr3qq for decapping YM2164.

https://siliconpr0n.org/map/yamaha/ym2151/
https://github.com/gtr3qq/ym2164_dieshot

# Modification Notice

this is a modified version of YM2151-LLE. the changes include adding functions to allow its usage.

based off commit 519a7f009e5abe737030e0498a53277a4c95d5d0.
